---
id: get-spotify-callback
title: "Spotify OAuth callback"
description: "Handles the OAuth callback from Spotify. Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and stores the Spotify integration credentials."
sidebar_label: "Spotify OAuth callback"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Spotify OAuth callback"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/auth/spotify/callback"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Handles the OAuth callback from Spotify. Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and stores the Spotify integration credentials.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
